creator: raob@vivaldi.net
text:
(In reply to Jason E. Hale from comment #9)
All right, thank you for clarifying.

Do you have any comment about why Adriaan says Calligra cannot be in the ports tree of FreeBSD when it is in the ports tree of OpenBSD and when the ports tree of FreeBSD includes both KDE Frameworks 5 and KDE Frameworks 6 and Qt5 and Qt6 and one can run a KDE Plasma 6 desktop environment just as easily as the prior version?
